creator: kde@FreeBSD.org
text:
We'd (kde@ team) like to request exp-run for Qt 4.8.0, PyQt 4.9.1 and KDE SC 4.8.1. The patches are independent and can be applied in any order:

http://people.freebsd.org/~makc/patches/qt-4.8.0.diff
http://people.freebsd.org/~makc/patches/pyqt-4.9.1.diff
http://people.freebsd.org/~makc/patches/kde-4.8.1.diff
